description: Bug report that mentions specific file paths. Should trigger request_repo_info / grep_repo code-digging.

issue.title: [Bug] electron-builder 26.8.1 fails on macOS notarization step
issue.body:
## Repro

Run `pnpm --filter @electron-template/desktop build:mac` on a Mac with Xcode 15.

The build fails at the notarize step with:

```
error: Failed to notarize: cannot find notarytool in PATH
```

## Suspect

I think the issue is in `apps/desktop/electron-builder.json` — the `mac.notarize` block is missing the `notarytoolPath` field.

## Expected

Either set `notarytoolPath` or fall back to Apple's `notarytool` CLI which should be on PATH after Xcode 15.

expected.rationale: Clear file path, concrete diagnostic, scoped config fix
